skillChanges.title: Divine Awakening
skillChanges.description:
New Effect:
When Athena resurrects, she will fly toward the nearest allied tower, dealing physical damage and launching nearby enemies at the point of takeoff.
Changed Active Skills While in True Form
Divine Form – Skill 1: Dashes in the target direction.
Divine Form – Skill 2: Grants a shield to a nearby ally for 2s.
Divine Form – Ultimate: Flies to the nearest allied tower, dealing physical damage and launching nearby enemies at the point of takeoff. At the same time, protects nearby teammates. Those protected by Athena will go along with her.
skillChanges.descriptionText:
New Effect:
When Athena resurrects, she will fly toward the nearest allied tower, dealing physical damage and launching nearby enemies at the point of takeoff.
Changed Active Skills While in True Form
Divine Form – Skill 1: Dashes in the target direction.
Divine Form – Skill 2: Grants a shield to a nearby ally for 2s.
Divine Form – Ultimate: Flies to the nearest allied tower, dealing physical damage and launching nearby enemies at the point of takeoff. At the same time, protects nearby teammates. Those protected by Athena will go along with her.

Base Damage (counts as Basic Attack):
Before: 120 (+24 per skill level) (+24% Physical Attack) (cannot critical hit)
Now: 120 (+24 per skill level) (+18% Physical Attack) (can critical hit)
Additional Magical Damage:
Before: 100 (+20 per skill level) (+16% Physical Attack)
Now: 90 (+18 per skill level) (+18% extra Physical Attack)

skillChanges.title: Awesome Barrage
skillChanges.description:
New Effect:
Can lifesteal, every 3 bullets counts as 1 Basic Attack
On-Hit Multiplier:
50% → Every 3 bullets counts as 1 Basic Attack
Effect Adjustment:
Before: Every 1.5% Attack Speed increases firing rate by 1%, up to 100%
Now: Every 2% Attack Speed increases skill casting speed by 1%
Duration:
Before: 5s
Now: 4.5s (+0.9 per skill level)
